description: A large nylon pouch worn on either leg.  It's intended to store one's gas mask, but could serve as a dump pouch.

variants.description: A large nylon pouch.  Designed to take in a variety of gas masks, in a pinch it can be used as an impromptu dump pouch.  This model is meant to be worn on either leg, attached to the belt.  <variant:multicam>

description: A pair of nylon pouches with straps to attach to the leg with.  Each holds up to two rifle magazines.

variants.description: A pair of nylon pouches for STANAG magazines, with straps to attach to the leg with.  Each pouch holds up to two 30-round STANAG magazines, or those of similar sizes.  <variant:coyote>
A pair of nylon pouches for STANAG magazines, with straps to attach to the leg with.  Each pouch holds up to two 30-round STANAG magazines, or those of similar sizes.  <variant:black>

description: A nylon pouch with straps to hold onto either leg.  Can also be strapped to webbing.  Provides extra storage.

variants.description: A large nylon pouch, with straps to wear on the leg with.  Intended to carry medical devices and emergency medicine, it can easily be used for extra storage.  Can be strapped onto PALS webbing, and provides features external PALS webbing of its own.  <variant:multicam>

A large nylon pouch, with straps to wear on the leg with.  Intended to carry medical devices and emergency medicine, it can easily be used for extra storage.  Can be strapped onto PALS webbing, and provides features external PALS webbing of its own.  <variant:coyote>

description: A large nylon pouch, with strap to hold onto either leg.  Provides a lot of extra storage in exchange for encumbrance.

variants.description: A large nylon pouch, with straps to wear on the leg with.  The cord lock mechanism can quickly secure a large inner compartment.  <variant:multicam>
